'''Kisquar''' was a [[Mriss/Legends|Mriss]] [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] operative. He was [[Sprax]]'s chief lieutenant in the [[Sisar Run/Legends|Sisar Run]]. Kisquar was in charge of shipjacking, stolen starship and parts fencing and an information broker. Before joining Black Sun, he was a prominent [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]], shipjacker and [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]]. Kisquar had contacts with both the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. About twelve Black Sun agents worked for him, including [[Information broker/Legends|infochants]] and ace pilots.

==Personality and traits==
Kisquar's plumage was red and black.

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Kisquar is identified as a [[Mriss/Legends|Mriss]] in ''[[Secrets of the Sisar Run]]'', though the illustration depicts him as a [[Mrlssi]]. This may very well be a mistake resulting from the two species being confused often.
